privileged_info_summary: The autocrop_image@1 task uses real Unsplash photo URLs (600x400 JPEG images) as primary data source, with ImageMagick-generated synthetic test images as fallback. The task runs in a GIMP 2.10-compatible environment with 60-second timeout and 5-step maximum. Verification checks four criteria: dimension reduction (≥10px or ≥5% in one dimension), content preservation (SSIM ≥0.90), border removal effectiveness (≥1.2x edge density improvement), and image modification detection. The task passes with 3/4 criteria met (75% threshold). Notably, task.json contains no 'metadata' field, only core configuration fields.
